content:
{
  "rules": [
    {
      "parameter": "crah.chilled_water_entering_temperature",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "design_basis",
      "unit": "deg C",
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Verify entering and leaving chilled water temperatures match the design basis values."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "crah.chilled_water_leaving_temperature",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "design_basis",
      "unit": "deg C",
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Verify entering and leaving chilled water temperatures match the design basis values."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "crah.temperature_sensor_type",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "RTD",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Temperature measurements shall use calibrated RTD sensors with accuracy of +/- 0.1°C."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "crah.temperature_sensor_accuracy",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": 0.1,
      "unit": "deg C",
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Temperature measurements shall use calibrated RTD sensors with accuracy of +/- 0.1°C."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "crah.temperature_sensor_calibrated",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "calibrated",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Temperature measurements shall use calibrated RTD sensors with accuracy of +/- 0.1°C."
    }
  ]
}
